name: Chinese Chicken
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Chicken breasts, skinned and cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim any fat from the chicken and thinly slice it diagonally.
2. In a large non-stick pan or wok, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
3. Add the chicken pieces and stir-fry for 3 to 4 minutes until cooked through. Remove with a slotted spoon and keep warm.
4. Add broccoli and cauliflower to the same pan and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
5. Stir in the mushrooms, green onions, soy sauce, sherry, and gingerroot. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Stir in the dissolved arrowroot mixture (arrowroot mixed with water) and sesame oil. Add the reserved chicken pieces back into the pan and cook until heated through.
This dish is easy to prepare and visually appealing, making it a great choice for entertaining. Serve with Orange Rice (available separately).
Food Exchange per serving: 3.5 LOW/FAT MEAT EXCHANGES + 2 VEGETABLES EXCHANGES
Calories: 256; Protein: 30g; Carbohydrates: 9g; Fat: 10g
